verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Woe to those who give less [than due],
verse.verse_2: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.
verse.verse_3: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
verse.verse_4: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
verse.verse_6: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?
verse.verse_7: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
verse.verse_8: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
verse.verse_9: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
verse.verse_10: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
verse.verse_11: Who deny the Day of Recompense.
verse.verse_12: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
verse.verse_13: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
verse.verse_14: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
verse.verse_15: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
verse.verse_16: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.
verse.verse_17: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
verse.verse_18: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun.
verse.verse_19: And what can make you know what is 'illiyyun?
verse.verse_20: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
verse.verse_21: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
verse.verse_22: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
verse.verse_24: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
verse.verse_25: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.
verse.verse_26: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
verse.verse_27: And its mixture is of Tasneem,
verse.verse_28: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.
verse.verse_29: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
verse.verse_30: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.
verse.verse_31: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.
verse.verse_32: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."
verse.verse_33: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.
verse.verse_34: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,
verse.verse_36: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?
